name: Proline Adult Cat Food - Fish 1.2kg
shortDescription: Fully balanced all-natural cat food with fish protein. Carefully formulated by a cat nutritionist to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult cats.
description: Proline Adult Cat Food - Fish , fully balanced all-natural cat food with fish protein. Carefully formulated by a cat nutritionist to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult cats. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein ............................... 31% Fat ......................................12% Crude Ash ..............................8% Crude Cellulose (Fiber).......... 3% INGREDIENTS: Processed Animal Protein, Wheat, Corn, Animal Fat, Wheat Middling's, Corn Gluten, Dried Sugar Beet, Chicken Liver Aroma, Salt, Flaxseed, Dried Brewer's Yeast, Taurine. MINERALS: Calcium, Phosphorus, Sodium, Iodine, Zinc, Copper, Potassium Chloride, Iron, Selenium. VITAMINS: Vit. A, Vit. D, Vit. E, Vit. C, Vit. B1 - B2 - B3 (niacin) - B6 - B12 - B7 (biotin) - B9 (folic acid), Vit. K, Choline, Calcium Pantotetan. These nutrients support: . Healthy immune system . Strong bones and teeth . Optimal metabolism and organ function Why Pet Parents Love Proline Fish: . Supports overall wellness for adult cats. . Made with high-quality fish protein for cats who love seafood flavors. . Includes taurine for healthy eyes and a strong heart.
